text: should i quit my job and go freelance?
how much money do you have saved up
omg do it... life's too short for a job you hate
i literally quit my job to freelance last year lol worst decision ever
are you quitting a job or escaping responsibility
nah priya's wrong lol
babe what's the worst that could happen
what's actually bothering you about it
lmao priya hard disagree. freelancing was the best decision for me. you just gotta pick the right domain.
what priya said... why was it bad??
domain matters. priya probably picked something oversaturated.
nah tanmay not running away lol. boss literally asked me to do 3 peoples jobs for same pay
so it's a prison break not a career move then
lmao prison break sounds more fun
omg that's insane... leave. now.
yo what that's illegal
leave lol. stop overthinking it
omg that's literally what happened to me in Pune lol
same story different city priya lol
bosses really think loyalty is free labor 💀
ikr my last boss literally said "we're a family here" then paid me nothing lol
